subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Akbar! Give ear unto the Call which hath been raised in truth from the Dayspring of Divine decree, that it may guide thee unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قبل اکبر ان استمع الندآء الذی ارتفع بالحق من مطلع القدر لیبلغک الی
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @work as worship
